title: Colorful Philosophers
description:
Before you is a rather epic sight.
You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a [jitter][red]heated debate[/red][/jitter] over the philosophical implications of color.

As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is [gold]THE BEST[/gold].

You chime in with your thoughts.
conditions: Requires at least one unlocked character card pool other than the player's current character pool
notes: Up to 3 of the 5 color options are randomly available each run, depending on which character card pools you have unlocked. You cannot select your character's starting color. Each option offers 3 card rewards filtered by rarity: one with Common cards, one with Uncommon cards, and one with Rare cards from the chosen color's card pool. Note: The localization data includes an unused "Equality" option that would offer Prismatic Shard, but this option is never generated by the event code.
